formulaHelp.description: The acting battler (view: level, hp, maxHp, atk, def, mat, mdf).
The primary target battler (same fields as a).
Alias for the target battler (same fields as a).
Enemy battler in reward/encounter contexts (same fields as a).
Ally battler in support contexts (same fields as a).
Max HP after traits (also on b/target/enemy/ally).
Magic attack after traits (also on b/target/enemy/ally).
Magic defense after traits (also on b/target/enemy/ally).
Per-round MP drain after traits (also on b/target/enemy/ally).
Battler display name, for EMIT_TEXT args (also on b/target/enemy/ally).
The battler's row: "front" or "back". Assigned by fielded slot at battle start (1-2 front, 3-4 back); no combat math consumes it yet.
True when the current map is flagged safe (no MP drain).
The map's encounterRate override, falling back to combat.encounterChance.
Sum of FLEE_CHANCE_BONUS trait rates over living members.
Number of enemies (alias: enemies.count); enemies has the same aggregate fields as party.
Random integer in [m, n]; random() gives a float in [0, 1).
Expose custom meta keys from the battler's database entry (also on b/target/enemy/ally).
Reads meta key on ingredient 1 (item metadata, also on ingredient2).
Distinct non-empty inventory stacks (bounds an inventory-list cursor).
Per-party-slot skill counts, e.g. session.skillCount[v.idx] (bounds the status scene's skill-inspector cursor).
Per-party-slot passive counts, e.g. session.passiveCount[v.idx] (bounds the status scene's passive-inspector cursor).
SET_LIST sprite/gaugeValue/gaugeMax evaluate against each row's fields (e.g. hp, maxHp, spriteKey).

scriptingHelp.description: Read-only session view: gold, mp, maxMp, floor.
Battle info when in a battle phase: { round }.
The acting battler handle, when one exists.
The target battler handle, when one exists.
Flow-local variables shared with SET_VAR / formulas.
Real session object — only present when scripting.allowRawAccess is true.
Real data loader — only present when scripting.allowRawAccess is true.
Deal n damage via effects.apply; death/log events emit normally.
Heal n HP via effects.apply, capped at max HP.
Add n of item id to the inventory.
Remove n of item id (fails soft).
Grant XP through the normal level-up pipeline.
Add a state via the status pipeline (emits state_add).
Set or clear a session flag.
Append a raw event to the phase's event stream.
Lua stdlib copies (mutations do not leak to the engine).
The seeded math.random — deterministic under the golden harness.

commands.label: Show Text
commands.description: Shows a dialogue line and waits for input.

commands.label: Show Choice
commands.description: Presents options; each option carries its own command list.

commands.label: Conditional Branch
commands.description: Branches on a flag:/hasItem: condition string.

commands.label: Recover Party
commands.description: Fully restores the party and shows the recovery line.

commands.label: Teleport
commands.description: Teleport the party to another location.

commands.label: Open Shop
commands.description: Opens the shop scene stocked from data/shops.json for the given shop id.

commands.label: Offer Quest
commands.description: Marks a quest active (quest:<id>:active flag) and runs the quest.offer flow (or the quest's acceptHook, if it has one).

commands.label: Complete Quest
commands.description: Runs the quest.complete flow (or the quest's completeHook): takes item requirements and grants rewards, then marks the quest completed (quest:<id>:completed flag).

commands.label: Start Battle
commands.description: Triggers an encounter on the current map.

commands.label: Give Random Treasure
commands.description: Grants a random item from the map's treasure list.

commands.label: Call Common Event
commands.description: Runs a common event's commands inline.

commands.label: Label
commands.description: Marks a jump target for JUMP_TO_LABEL elsewhere in this event/common event's command list. No effect on its own.

commands.label: Jump to Label
commands.description: Unconditionally jumps to the matching LABEL anywhere in this same event/common event (including inside other CHOICE options or branches). Does not cross CALL_COMMON_EVENT boundaries.

commands.label: Comment
commands.description: Documentation only; the interpreter skips it entirely.

commands.label: Control Variables
commands.description: Sets one or several flow-local variables, readable as v.name in formulas. Single form: name + value. Multi form: assignments rows, evaluated in order so later values can read earlier ones via v. — when assignments is present, name/value are ignored.

commands.label: Set Flag
commands.description: Sets or clears a session flag (the same flags conditions read).

commands.label: If
commands.description: Runs then/else on a formula condition; flag:/hasItem: strings stay valid.

commands.label: For Each
commands.description: Iterates enemies, living_enemies, allies, living_allies, party, or slot_allies (living battlers in battle slots 1-4, matching the legacy per-slot loops).

commands.label: Gain Gold
commands.description: Adds floor(amount) gold to the party, clamped at 0.

commands.label: Grant XP
commands.description: Grants XP through the normal level-up pipeline.

commands.label: Damage
commands.description: Deals damage via effects.apply so death/log events stay consistent. pierce skips DEF/element scaling and minHp floors HP without killing (legacy-exact raw damage).

commands.label: Heal
commands.description: Heals via effects.apply, capped at max HP. With a trait code, heals silently by the target's rate for that trait (absorbed TRAIT_HEAL).

commands.label: Add State
commands.description: Adds a state through the status pipeline.

commands.label: Remove State
commands.description: Removes a state through the status pipeline.

commands.label: Change MP
commands.description: Changes the shared MP pool by a signed amount.

commands.label: Drain MP
commands.description: Drains the shared MP pool, clamped at 0.

commands.label: Restore MP
commands.description: Restores the shared MP pool, capped at max MP.

commands.label: State Ticks
commands.description: Runs the regen/poison/duration-decay block for all battlers.

commands.label: Emit Text
commands.description: Emits a battle-log/text event via formatTerm.

commands.label: Change Item
commands.description: Gives or takes items by a signed count.

commands.label: Take Item
commands.description: Removes items from the inventory (fails soft).

commands.label: Use Item
commands.description: Applies an item's data-defined effects and consumes one. itemIndex is 1-based into the id-sorted inventory (the window renderer's 'inventory' list order); items with target 'party' hit every member, otherwise target is a party index.

commands.label: Equip Item
commands.description: Equips gear on a party member. slot: 1=Weapon 2=Armor 3=Accessory; target is a party index; itemIndex is 1-based into the window renderer's 'equipment' list order (1 = unequip, then matching inventory gear id-ascending). Previous gear returns to the inventory.

commands.label: Give Specific Item
commands.description: Adds a specific item (GIVE_ITEM stays the random-treasure command).

commands.label: Reap Fallen Spirits
commands.description: Permadeath sweep: removes every party spirit still dead (plus emergency-wave casualties) and banks their EXP at the sacrifice rate. Meant for battle.victory / battle.escaped.

commands.label: Roll Encounter
commands.description: Rolls math.random() < chance; on success emits an encounter event the map host consumes.

commands.label: Spawn Enemies
commands.description: Weighted enemy pick from the current map's encounter table; emits a spawn_enemies event with the built group.

commands.label: Emit Raw Event
commands.description: Emits a raw event of the given type (e.g. flee_success) for the host loop to consume.

commands.label: Emit Text
commands.description: Emits text event using terms.

commands.label: Scene Event
commands.description: Emits a scene_change event that scene_host consumes; the interpreter never switches scenes itself. Optional vars ({name, value} rows, evaluated against the pushing scene right now) are applied to the pushed scene's v right after its own on_enter runs, e.g. to hand it a chosen party member index.

commands.label: Fall Through to Legacy Input
commands.description: Marks this hook invocation as unhandled so the legacy input underneath it runs instead (e.g. map movement on up/down/left/right when no menu overlay is open). Any hook key otherwise intercepts its key unconditionally.

commands.label: Load Map
commands.description: Loads the map with the given index into the session (title New Game, warps). If mapId is omitted, defaults to system.spawn.mapId.

commands.label: Quit Game
commands.description: Quits the game (title Exit).

commands.label: Reset Session
commands.description: Discards the current session and starts a fresh one with the starting party (game over / new game).

commands.label: List Campaigns
commands.description: Fills v.campaignRows (rows: name = display title, campaign = dir name, empty = default data/) and v.campaignCount from the available campaign roots (title campaign picker).

commands.label: Switch Campaign
commands.description: Switches the active campaign root to campaigns/<name> (empty name = default data/), reloads loader/config, and persists the campaign.json pointer. Follow with RESET_SESSION + re-enter the scene.

commands.label: List Save Slots
commands.description: Fills v.saveRows (rows: name = display label, slot = slot id, empty = true if unused) and v.saveCount from a fixed set of save slots (default 3, override with count). Used by the Save/Load menus.

commands.label: Save Game
commands.description: Saves the current session into the given slot (default 'slot1'). Records the scene BELOW this one on the stack, so Save must be reached by pushing on top of town/map (same restriction as F5 quicksave).

commands.label: Load Game
commands.description: Loads the given slot, rebuilds the session, and transitions to the scene it was saved from. Sets v.loadError if the slot can't be read.

commands.label: List Active Quests
commands.description: Fills v.questRows (rows: name, id, summary, objectives, completed) and v.questCount from quests the session has active or completed (session.flags quest:<id>:active/:completed). Quest-level only, no per-objective tracking.

commands.label: List Input Bindings
commands.description: Fills v.bindingRows (rows: name = 'BUTTON - key', button, key) and v.bindingCount from engine.input_map's current SNES-button->key bindings, in a fixed button order. Used by the Controls scene.

commands.label: Set Input Binding
commands.description: Rebinds the given SNES button (A/B/X/Y/L/R/START/SELECT/UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) to the given LOVE key name via engine.input_map, persisting to data/input.json. No-op if the button name is unknown.

commands.label: Script Call
commands.description: Sandboxed Lua escape hatch (see scriptingHelp). Forbidden in shipped default flows and built-in scenes; allowed in extra (user-authored) scenes.

commands.label: Open Window
commands.description: Opens a UI window.

commands.label: Close Window
commands.description: Closes a UI window.

commands.label: Set List
commands.description: Binds a list source to a window. Optional row widgets: sprite = row field holding a small battler sheet key; gaugeValue/gaugeMax = row-scoped formulas drawn as a bar under each row. slot/member are draw-time formulas for the 'equipSlots' and 'equipment' sources (slot: 1=Weapon 2=Armor 3=Accessory, member: party index).

commands.label: Set Text
commands.description: Sets text in a window.

commands.label: Set Cursor
commands.description: Sets cursor position (formula for dynamic index).

commands.label: Focus Window
commands.description: Focuses a UI window.

commands.label: Play Animation
commands.description: Plays an animation.

commands.label: Wait
commands.description: Waits for a duration.

commands.label: Apply Skill/Item Effects
commands.description: Applies the acting skill or item effects to the targets.

commands.label: Take Quest Requirements
commands.description: Verifies and consumes the active quest's item requirements.

commands.label: Grant Quest Rewards
commands.description: Grants the active quest's rewards (XP, Gold, Items, Flags).

effectTypes.label: HP Damage
effectTypes.description: Deals formula damage, reduced by the target's DEF and scaled by elemental affinity.

effectTypes.label: HP Heal
effectTypes.description: Restores formula HP, capped at max HP.

effectTypes.label: HP Drain
effectTypes.description: Deals formula damage and heals the user for the same amount.

effectTypes.label: Add Status
effectTypes.description: Applies a state with the given chance and turn duration.

effectTypes.label: Max HP Up
effectTypes.description: Permanently raises max HP and heals the difference.

effectTypes.label: Grant XP
effectTypes.description: Grants experience points, possibly leveling up.

effectTypes.label: MP Restore
effectTypes.description: Restores the summoner's shared MP pool.

effectTypes.label: Remove Status
effectTypes.description: Cures the state named in value.

effectTypes.label: Recruit Egg
effectTypes.description: Reserved for the recruiting system (not yet implemented by the engine).

traitCodes.label: Parameter +
traitCodes.description: Adds a flat amount to a parameter.

traitCodes.label: HP Regen
traitCodes.description: Regenerates a fraction of max HP per turn.

traitCodes.label: Post-Battle Heal
traitCodes.description: Restores HP to the holder after victory.

traitCodes.label: Parasite
traitCodes.description: Drains HP from a nearby ally each turn.

traitCodes.label: Ambush Damage
traitCodes.description: Damages an enemy at battle start.

traitCodes.label: Heal on Move
traitCodes.description: Restores HP when moving on the map.

traitCodes.label: Symbiosis
traitCodes.description: Heals a neighboring ally each turn.

traitCodes.label: Initiative
traitCodes.description: Chance to act first at battle start.

traitCodes.label: Element Change
traitCodes.description: Overrides the holder's elements with dataId while active.
